title: Middle East crisis live: Hezbollah reports clashes with IDF north of Israeli-held buffer zone
summary_full: Ground troops clash in close combat north of Litani river following huge bombing raid and Netanyahu’s pledge to take control of new areasDonald Trump will host the 12th cabinet meeting of his second term on Wednesday as talks on ending the nearly three-month war with Iran reach a crucial stage amid conflicting signals over whether an agreement is close.The gathering had originally been scheduled to take place in the bucolic setting of Camp David, the presidential retreat that had previously been the site of sensitive Middle East negotiations, including the historic Israeli-Egyptian peace accords. Continue reading...
